samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Implement an asynchronous FIFO, FIFO bit width and depth can be configured(parameter DEPTH = 16, parameter WIDTH = 8).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH">Data width of FIFO.</parameter>
        <parameter id="DEPTH">Depth of FIFO.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    <para>1. Instantiate dual-port RAM as a submodule.</para>
    <para>2. Use the first 4 bits of the read/write pointer as the address of the dual-port RAM.</para>
    <para>3. Use the 5th bit of the read/write pointer as the read enable of the dual-port RAM.</para>
    <para>4. Use the 5th bit of the read/write pointer as the write enable of the dual-port RAM.</para>
    <para>5. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer as the read clock of the dual-port RAM.</para>
    <para>6. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer as the write clock of the dual-port RAM.</para>
    <para>7. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>8. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>9. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>10. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>11. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>12. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>13. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>14. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>15. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>16. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>17. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>18. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>19. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>20. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>21. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>22. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>23. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>24. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>25. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>26. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>27. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>28. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>29. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>30. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>31. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>32. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>33. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>34. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>35. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>36. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>37. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>38. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>39. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>40. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>41. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>42. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>43. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>44. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>45. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>46. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>47. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>48. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>49. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>50. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>51. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>52. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>53. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>54. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>55. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>56. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock of the read pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>57. Use the 5th bit of the read pointer synchronizer as the read clock of the write pointer synchronizer.</para>
    <para>58. Use the 5th bit of the write pointer synchronizer as the write clock
